articles.title: FIFA lifts US star striker Balogun’s red card suspension at World Cup after Trump calls Infantino
articles.description:
Balogun can now play in the U.S. Round of 16 matchup with Belgium on Monday.

The post FIFA lifts US star striker Balogun’s red card suspension at World Cup after Trump calls Infantino appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: FIFA lifted Balogun's red card suspension, allowing him to play in the World Cup.
Balogun will participate in the U.S. Round of 16 match against Belgium on Monday.
His availability boosts the U.S. team's chances, impacting local fans and supporters.
